CashDeemedCharitableExplnStmt.ShortExplanationTxt: CASH REQUIRED TO MAINTAIN AND CONTINUED OPERATION OF TRUST FARM. RESERVED AMOUNT FOR CONSTRUCTION OF A VISITOR CENTER WITH EDUCATION AREA.
